{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shera's shears
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s shears are a pair of specialized blades used by [[Gardeners]], serving as both essential tools and significant weapons. The set consists of a bronze blade held in the right hand and a second blade kept in the left. The bronze shear is capable of cutting through bone with ease, parrying fireballs, and emitting a silver-blue light known as [[Bastion's Veil]]. The left-hand shear is distinguished by its green color and a profound amount of bound [[Intent]]. This second blade possesses a long, violent history spanning over a millennium, having been utilized by generations of assassins and [[Consultants]] to take many lives, including that of [[the Emperor]] of humanity. Because of this concentrated [[Intent]], the left shear can be mentally distracting to its wielder, sometimes producing a buzzing sensation or an impression of laughter. While the bronze blade is a standard symbol for a [[Gardener]], the left shear is an [[Awakened weapon]] with deep historical ties to the [[Empire]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has shears that are a pair of bronze blades.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] uses shears to threaten targets.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera's shears]] consist of a black cloth belt with two heavy sheaths and blades of ancient bronze.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] carries shears in sheaths.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera's shears]] were forged as a pair.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
